description: Formal responsive system for the AI-native design system. Defines breakpoints, fluid layouts, container queries, content density, and per-component responsive rules.

mobile.label: Mobile
mobile.description: Small mobile devices from 320px to 767px wide

wide.label: Wide Desktop
wide.description: Large desktop displays 1440px and wider with centered content

fluidTypography.description: Font sizes scale fluidly between mobile and desktop breakpoints using CSS clamp function
fluidTypography.strategy: Use CSS clamp(minimum, preferred, maximum) for smooth scaling without breakpoint jumps

display.label: Display
display.usage: Page titles and major section headings

body-lg.label: Body Large
body-lg.usage: Larger body text and lead paragraphs

fluidSpacing.description: Spacing scales fluidly to maintain visual rhythm across breakpoints
fluidSpacing.strategy: Use CSS clamp for spacing to avoid jarring jumps at breakpoints

space-1.usage: Minimal spacing between closely related elements

space-8.usage: Extra large spacing for page sections

containerQueries.description: Component-level responsive behavior using container query sizes
containerQueries.strategy: Define container query sizes for common layout scenarios

xs.label: Extra Small
xs.description: Compact container for narrow sidebars or mobile layouts

rules.behavior: Stack content vertically, hide secondary actions, single column layout
Compact card layout with essential information visible
Side-by-side layout with image on inline-start
Full featured card with all options visible
Single column layout, stacked footer buttons
Content focused with optional sidebar
Full layout with sidebar, main content, and footer
Card view mode, one item per row
Table mode with scrollable columns
Full table mode with all columns visible
Full width chat interface optimized for mobile
Chat with expandable side panel for context
Stacked single column layout for mobile
Two column layout with sidebar
Full three column layout with collapsible sidebar
Single column form layout for mobile
Two column form layout
Full featured multi-column form
Mobile navigation with hamburger menu
Compact horizontal navigation with scroll
Full horizontal navigation with all items visible

contentDensity.description: Three levels of content density for different use cases and accessibility needs

levels.label: Compact
levels.targetAudience: Power users, admin interfaces, data-heavy applications
levels.useCase: When showing large datasets or dense information is priority
levels.accessibility: Ensure sufficient touch target sizes (minimum 44px for interactive elements)

levels.label: Default
levels.useCase: Balanced between information density and readability
levels.accessibility: Meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards for all users

levels.label: Comfortable
levels.useCase: When readability and ease of use is priority
levels.accessibility: Enhanced accessibility with larger spacing and fonts

directionality.description: Support for left-to-right and right-to-left text direction

modes.label: Left-to-Right
modes.language: English, French, Spanish, German, and most languages

modes.label: Right-to-Left
modes.language: Arabic, Hebrew, Persian, Urdu, and other RTL languages
mirrorRules: Icons with directional meaning (arrows, triangles, pointers)
Transform and rotate values in animations
specificRules: Use logical CSS properties (margin-inline, padding-block, etc.) instead of physical properties (margin-left, padding-right)
Use start and end terminology instead of left and right in component props
Icons should be mirrored unless they have semantic meaning in specific direction
Text input should support native RTL input method editors
Form layout should adapt with labels on correct side per direction

rules.behavior: Full width or compact sizing
Standard sizing with flexible width
Standard sizing, can be grouped horizontally
Compact sizing with reduced padding
Standard sizing
Standard sizing with standard spacing
Full width alert with stacked action buttons
Full width with flexible button layout
Full width or contained with horizontal buttons
Use modal or popover instead of tooltip on touch devices
Standard tooltip with adaptive positioning
Standard tooltip with precise positioning
Single column, full width, vertical content stack
Flexible width with two-column option
Various layouts including side-by-side
Full width stacked layout without sidebar
Full width with optional sidebar beneath content
Horizontal layout with sidebar and main content
Full screen modal covering viewport
Centered modal with margins
Centered modal with fixed width
Full height slide-out drawer from side
Partial width drawer
Fixed width drawer
Full width input with larger touch target
rules.fontSize-note: Use 16px to prevent auto-zoom on iOS

rules.behavior: Full width or constrained based on context
Full width or constrained width
Native select picker for better mobile experience
Custom dropdown with mobile-optimized list
Custom dropdown with desktop-optimized list
Large checkbox for touch interaction
Standard checkbox
Standard checkbox
Large radio button for touch
Standard radio button
Standard radio button
Single column layout with labels on top
Two column layout with labels on top
Multi-column layout with flexible label positioning
Hamburger menu with bottom navigation bar
Horizontal navigation with scroll for overflow
Full horizontal navigation with all items visible
Collapsed breadcrumb showing only current and parent
Truncated breadcrumb with ellipsis
Full breadcrumb showing complete path
Previous and next buttons only
Previous, next, and current page number
Full pagination with all page numbers
Hidden by default, accessible via menu button
Collapsible sidebar
Persistent sidebar with optional collapse
Scrollable horizontal tabs with indicator
Scrollable tabs with flexible width
Non-scrollable tabs filling available width
Card view with one item per row
Table mode with essential columns and horizontal scroll
Full table mode with all columns
Stacked card view for table data
Scrollable table with reduced columns
Full featured table
Full width list items with generous padding
List with standard padding
List with compact padding
Full width chart with vertical legend
Flexible width chart with adaptive legend
Full featured chart with rich interactions
Vertical timeline with left-aligned content
Vertical timeline with alternating content
Vertical timeline with alternating content
Full width chat interface optimized for mobile
Chat with optional side panel for context
Full chat with expandable context panel
Single column stacked layout without sidebar
Two column layout with sidebar beneath
Three column layout with left sidebar
Minimal header with hamburger menu
Standard header with some actions visible
Full header with all actions visible
Single column stacked footer
Two column footer layout
Multi-column footer with organized sections
Single column form layout
Two column form layout
Multi-column form with flexible layout
Full width empty state with stacked content
Centered empty state with moderate spacing
Centered empty state with generous spacing

inputOptimizations.fontSize: Use minimum 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom
inputOptimizations.nativePickersPreferred: Use native select/date/time pickers on mobile
inputOptimizations.keyboardType: Match input type to keyboard (email, tel, number, url, etc)
inputOptimizations.autoComplete: Enable browser autofill with proper autocomplete attributes

performanceConsiderations.imageOptimization: Load appropriately sized images for viewport width
performanceConsiderations.lazyLoading: Lazy load images and off-screen content
performanceConsiderations.avoidHover: Do not rely on hover states on touch devices

responsiveAccessibility.focusManagement: Ensure focus visible at all breakpoints
responsiveAccessibility.screenReaders: Test with screen readers at different breakpoints
responsiveAccessibility.touchAlternatives: Provide non-hover alternatives for all interactions

densityAccessibility.compactDensity: Ensure minimum 44px touch targets even in compact mode
densityAccessibility.fontSizes: Do not reduce font size below 12px even in compact mode
densityAccessibility.lineHeight: Maintain adequate line height for readability

testingGuidelines.breakpointTesting: Test every component at each defined breakpoint
testingGuidelines.containerQueryTesting: Test container query components at multiple container sizes
testingGuidelines.orientationTesting: Test on both portrait and landscape orientations
testingGuidelines.touchTesting: Test touch interactions on actual devices or simulators
testingGuidelines.accessibilityTesting: Run automated and manual accessibility tests at each breakpoint
testingGuidelines.performanceTesting: Test load times and rendering performance on mobile devices
